reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine when the Battle of Saipan and the Battle of Stones River occurred.
2. Compare the two time periods and return whether the Battle of Stones River occurred before the Battle of Saipan.
original_final_question: Did the the Battle of Stones River occur before the Battle of Saipan? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: The Battle of Stones River was fought from December 31, 1862, to January 2, 1863, while the Battle of Saipan was fought from 15 June to 9 July 1944, so the Battle of Stones River occurred before the Battle of Saipan. -> yes
